action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Covered garbage receptacle not provided or inadequate, except that garbage receptacle may be uncovered during active use. Garbage storage area not properly constructed or maintained; grinder or compactor dirty.
Live roaches present in facility's food and/or non-food areas.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Duties of an officer of the Department interfered with or obstructed.

Sanitized equipment or utensil, including in-use food dispensing utensil, improperly used or stored.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Food Protection Certificate not held by supervisor of food operations.

violations.description: Sanitized equipment or utensil, including in-use food dispensing utensil, improperly used or stored.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Raw, cooked or prepared food is adulterated, contaminated, cross-contaminated, or not discarded in accordance with HACCP plan.
Food from unapproved or unknown source or home canned. Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) fish not frozen before processing; or ROP foods prepared on premises transported to another site.
Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed and sanitized after each use and following any activity when contamination may have occurred.
